# First-Agent

> Locally orchestrated, mixed-tier LLM coding agent for a single
> power-user. Filesystem-canonical knowledge (Markdown + YAML
> frontmatter); read-side scales lazily from grep to BM25 to
> vectors only when the corpus justifies it. Implementation language
> is Python; target codebases the agent reads can be anything.
>
> This file is an index for LLM agents that want to ingest the
> project documentation in one fetch. Convention: see
> https://llmstxt.org/. Paths below are GitHub raw URLs against
> the `main` branch.

## Repo entrypoints

- [README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/README.md): Project overview, current status, roadmap (Russian).
- [AGENTS.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/AGENTS.md): Instructions for AI agents working in this repo (English).
- [HANDOFF.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/HANDOFF.md): Cross-LLM session handoff — current state, next steps, bootstrap pointer (mirrors the Devin Knowledge note).

## Docs (`docs/`)

- [docs/README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/docs/README.md): Wiki index.
- [docs/architecture.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/docs/architecture.md): Three-layer agent architecture (Interface / Cognitive / Execution).
- [docs/workflow.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/docs/workflow.md): R-S-M lifecycle and Devin session conventions.
- [docs/prompting.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/docs/prompting.md): T1-T5 prompt templates and anti-patterns.
- [docs/devin-reference.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/docs/devin-reference.md): Devin-specific reference (Knowledge notes, Skills, Playbooks).
- [docs/glossary.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/docs/glossary.md): Project glossary.
- [docs/agent%20creation%20github.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/docs/agent%20creation%20github.md): Step-by-step agent-creation tutorial.

## Project knowledge (`knowledge/`)

- [knowledge/README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/README.md): Knowledge folder conventions, frontmatter schema, query routing.
- [knowledge/project-overview.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/project-overview.md): One-page product/scope snapshot for v0.1.

## ADRs (`knowledge/adr/`)

- [knowledge/adr/README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/adr/README.md): ADR process and index.
- [knowledge/adr/ADR-template.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/adr/ADR-template.md): ADR template (copy when adding a new decision).
- [knowledge/adr/ADR-1-v01-use-case-scope.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/adr/ADR-1-v01-use-case-scope.md): v0.1 use-case scope (UC1 + UC3 in; UC4 deferred; UC2 best-effort).
- [knowledge/adr/ADR-2-llm-tiering.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/adr/ADR-2-llm-tiering.md): LLM tiering and access (static role routing; Planner / Coder / Debug / Eval).
- [knowledge/adr/ADR-3-memory-architecture-variant.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/adr/ADR-3-memory-architecture-variant.md): Memory architecture variant for v0.1 (Variant A "Mechanical Wiki").
- [knowledge/adr/ADR-4-storage-backend.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/adr/ADR-4-storage-backend.md): Storage backend for v0.1 (SQLite FTS5).
- [knowledge/adr/ADR-5-chunker-tool.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/adr/ADR-5-chunker-tool.md): Chunker tool selection for v0.1 (universal-ctags + markdown-it-py).
- [knowledge/adr/ADR-6-tool-sandbox-allow-list.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/adr/ADR-6-tool-sandbox-allow-list.md): Tool sandbox & path allow-list policy for v0.1 (deny-by-default read+write allow-list at `~/.fa/sandbox.toml`).

## Prompts (`knowledge/prompts/`)

- [knowledge/prompts/README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/prompts/README.md): Prompts library conventions and index.
- [knowledge/prompts/RESOLVER.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/prompts/RESOLVER.md): Intent-to-template dispatcher (T1-T5 plus role prompts).
- [knowledge/prompts/research-topic.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/prompts/research-topic.md): T1 research-topic task prompt.
- [knowledge/prompts/architect-fa.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/prompts/architect-fa.md): Architect / Planner system prompt (full).
- [knowledge/prompts/architect-fa-compact.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/prompts/architect-fa-compact.md): Architect / Planner system prompt (compact).

## Research (`knowledge/research/`)

- [knowledge/research/memory-architecture-design-2026-04-26.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/memory-architecture-design-2026-04-26.md): Memory architecture roadmap, three variants, open questions. Source for ADR-3.
- [knowledge/research/agentic-memory-supplement.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/agentic-memory-supplement.md): Mem0 paper plus codedna / gbrain / sparks / gstack deltas.
- [knowledge/research/ai-context-os-memm-deep-dive.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/ai-context-os-memm-deep-dive.md): AI-Context-OS (MEMM) backend deep dive.
- [knowledge/research/llm-wiki-community-batch-1.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/llm-wiki-community-batch-1.md): Community LLM-Wiki survey, batch 1.
- [knowledge/research/llm-wiki-community-batch-2.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/llm-wiki-community-batch-2.md): Community LLM-Wiki survey, batch 2 plus GraphRAG comparison.
- [knowledge/research/llm-wiki-critique.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/llm-wiki-critique.md): Cross-cutting critique of LLM-Wiki / GraphRAG approaches.
- [knowledge/research/llm-wiki-critique-first-agent.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/llm-wiki-critique-first-agent.md): Critique applied to First-Agent's existing knowledge layout.
- [knowledge/research/llm-wiki-critique-sources.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/llm-wiki-critique-sources.md): Source list for the critique.
- [knowledge/research/agent-roles.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/agent-roles.md): Agent role taxonomy.
- [knowledge/research/agent-video-research.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/agent-video-research.md): Video-source research notes (predates current ADR series).
- [knowledge/research/architect-fa-refactor-ru.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/architect-fa-refactor-ru.md): Architect prompt refactor notes (Russian).
- [knowledge/research/chunker-design.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/chunker-design.md): Chunker design — universal-ctags vs tree-sitter vs per-language regex; recommendation for ADR-5.
- [knowledge/research/how-to-build-an-agent-ampcode-2026-04.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/how-to-build-an-agent-ampcode-2026-04.md): Разбор статьи Thorsten Ball / Amp «How to Build an Agent» — inner-loop, tool registry, 3 базовых tool'а (read_file / list_files / edit_file); mapping на ADR-1/ADR-2 и UC1.
- [knowledge/research/sliders-structured-reasoning-2026-04.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/sliders-structured-reasoning-2026-04.md): Разбор препринта SLIDERS (Stanford OV AL, arXiv:2604.22294) — aggregation-bottleneck, contextualized chunking, schema induction, relevance gate, primary-key reconciliation, SQL-QA; mapping на ADR-3 / ADR-4 / ADR-5 и UC2 / UC3.
- [knowledge/research/cross-reference-ampcode-sliders-to-adr-2026-04.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/cross-reference-ampcode-sliders-to-adr-2026-04.md): Cross-reference review двух новых research-нот (ampcode + SLIDERS) против ADR-1..5 — gaps, tensions, 10 пронумерованных рекомендаций (R-1..R-10) и 10 открытых вопросов под решение лида перед стартом Phase M.
- [knowledge/research/semi-autonomous-agents-cross-reference-2026-05.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/semi-autonomous-agents-cross-reference-2026-05.md): Критический разбор трёх источников по semi-autonomous LLM-агентам (deep-research-report, semi-autonomous-llm-agents research, репо `nextlevelbuilder/goclaw`) против ADR-1..6 — accept/defer/reject фильтрация; основа для ADR-2 §Amendment 2026-05-01 (MCP forward-compat) и ADR-1 §Amendment 2026-05-01 (UC5 deferred); input для будущего ADR-7 inner-loop (ACI principle, hooks primitive).
